title: senecio glomeratus
intro: Senecio glomeratus, also known as Clustered Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to relieve symptoms of fever, cough, and digestive issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Senecio glomeratus are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although its safety and efficacy should be confirmed through scientific studies.
